description: Production backstage faction-director (pi-actors, slice A: async, stateless single-line). Runs `pi -p` as a detached async actor with `--no-tools` (zero tools) and `--no-approve --no-context-files` (the child loads NO project extension / settings / AGENTS.md). Separate process + zero tools + its own session means it cannot read or write the GM's canonical state; its only input is the engine-assembled hermetic director prompt (built by run_parallel_line / buildBackstageDirectorPrompt). The prompt DOES carry privateFacts (the faction's hidden knowledge — by design), so the durable session holds secrets at rest and is pinned to `.pi/agent/backstage-sessions` (project-isolated + gitignored, where auth.json lives). The session id is the per-run id (stateless: each call is a fresh line; persistent per-faction directors are a later slice). The GM harvests the last assistant message → harvest_backstage_candidate validates → record_offscreen_event / resolve_backstage_line lands and settles the obligation. Mirrors engine/core/backstage-substrate-config.ts — keep the model and session_dir in sync.
